CustomField.formula: CEILING( TheoryFeeMin__c * Agency2_Factor_TradingStyle__c * Agency2_Factor_FunctionEvaluation__c * CategoryCoefficient__c * Agency2_Factor_Qualification__c * Factor_PriceExponential_CalculateMin__c * Agency2_OrderContributionRate__c / 100) * 100
CustomField.label: 代理店2_算出手数料(MIN)
